title: Coquet modded
description: An unofficial addon for the coquet resource pack that makes some modded blocks more consistent.
body:
Want to play with the [coquet](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/coquet) resource pack and mods? Then this addon is for you! It slightly improves the consistency of textures such as planks and ore blocks.

List of supported mods:
ars_nouveau
atmospheric
autumnity
caverns_and_chasms
endergetic
endlessbiomes
environmental
outer_end
thermal
upgrade_aquatic
